base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of elevator_platform — a tile from 1986 metroid. Elevator platform — moves Samus between zones. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Elevator platform — moves Samus between zones; 8 palette variants: 1/2/3/4 for armor vs suitless × normal/rocket. Elevators change color based on Samus's equipment
